      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getAppActivated()
      Whether the application is activated
      Y: Activated
      N: Not activated
      If value is empty, not support.
      java.lang.String getAppName()
      Application name.
      java.lang.String getAppVersion()
      Application version.
      java.lang.String getCharsPerLine()
      Number of characters per line for ShowMessage command.
      java.lang.String getHardwareConfigurationBitmap()
      "1" for each position means the hardware is present and supported by the application, "0" means the hardware is not supported or present.

      The application license expiration time.
      MMDDYYYY format

      Number of lines per screen for ShowMessage command.

      MAC address for LAN module in text.

      Terminal SN.

      WIFI mac address for WIFI modules in text

        MAC address

      • getLinesPerScreen

        public java.lang.String getLinesPerScreen()
        Number of lines per screen for ShowMessage command.
        Returns:
        Number of lines per screen.

      • getCharsPerLine

        public java.lang.String getCharsPerLine()
        Number of characters per line for ShowMessage command. 2 types of Numbers:
        1. Fix value for terminal models with Matrix Font Lib.
        2. Changeable value for terminal models with Vector Font value since the size is depending on the text, so terminal is always taking “W” in capital as the sample text and calculate the numbers.
        Returns:
        Number of characters per line

      • getAppName

        public java.lang.String getAppName()
        Application name.
        Returns:
        Application name.

      • getAppVersion

        public java.lang.String getAppVersion()
        Application version.
        Returns:
        Application version.

      • getWifiMac

        public java.lang.String getWifiMac()
        WIFI mac address for WIFI modules in text
        Returns:
        WIFI mac address

      • getTouchscreen

        public java.lang.String getTouchscreen()
        Indicates whether terminal use a touchscreen
        Y: Use
        N: Not use
        Returns:
        Whether terminal use a touchscreen
        Since:
        V1.07.00

      • getHardwareConfigurationBitmap

        public java.lang.String getHardwareConfigurationBitmap()
        "1" for each position means the hardware is present and supported by the application, "0" means the hardware is not supported or present. Please see Hardware Bitmap Definition
        for details.
        Returns:
        Determines what hardware is supported on the device.
        Since:
        V1.09.01

      • getAppActivated

        public java.lang.String getAppActivated()
        Whether the application is activated
        Y: Activated
        N: Not activated
        If value is empty, not support.
        Returns:
        Whether the application is activated
        Since:
        V1.10.00

      • getLicenseExpiry

        public java.lang.String getLicenseExpiry()
        The application license expiration time.
        MMDDYYYY format
        Returns:
        The application license expiration time.
        Since:
        V1.10.00

        protected void unpack(ManageResponse srcResponse)
